notes: ROC price transcription from Ofgem XLSX annual-report companions. SY9-SY22 exact from Figure A4.1 in SY22 dataset XLSX. SY5-SY8 derived: redistributed / rocs_issued (12-year XLSX + SY18 XLSX Table 4.5). SY1-SY4 algebraically estimated from scheme values and statutory buyout prices. eroc_gbp_per_roc deferred (e-ROC market data not yet transcribed). mutualisation_gbp_total: SY20 (2021-22) = £119,668,290 from SY22 XLSX Figures A3.3+A3.4.

sources.notes: SY22 annual report XLSX — Figure A4.1 provides exact recycle_gbp_per_roc and worth_of_roc (= buyout + recycle) for SY9 (2010-11) through SY22 (2023-24). Used as primary source for all SY9-SY22 values.

SY18 annual report XLSX — '4. Supplier Compliance' sheet Table 4.5 provides redistribution amounts 2002-03 to 2019-20, and Figure 4.5 provides scheme values 2002-03 to 2019-20. Used to derive recycle estimates for SY1-SY8.

12-year XLSX (2006-2018) — 'ROCs by Tech & Country' annual-section TOTAL rows provide annual ROC issue counts for SY5-SY8 (2006-07 to 2009-10). Used as denominator in recycle computation: recycle = redistributed / rocs_issued.
